title: Investigate failed Amplify deployment after PR 225 merge

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Investigating failed Amplify deployment for app d1cegb1ft4iove after PR #225 merge; starting with AWS Amplify job/status logs.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Root cause found in Amplify job 1036: backend build fails during CDK assembly with InvalidStorageAccessPathError because rubricMemory storage access used bare '*' instead of a required '*/' prefix. Applying hotfix to use rubric-memory/* as the single valid bucket prefix.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Verified original failed main deployment job 1034 and latest release job 1036 both failed with the same CDK assembly error: InvalidStorageAccessPathError for storage access path '*'. Opened hotfix PR #235 to change rubricMemory access to rubric-memory/*; Amplify deploy can only validate after that PR is approved/merged to main.
